summary: Frontend-only e2e test for new Courses (/courses, /courses/:id) and Serving Worldwide (/locations, /locations/:id) pages. All 10 requested flows PASSED with 0 console errors. Navbar renders on every page with correct testids, index pages show all 5 course/region cards, detail pages render title, highlights, syllabus/areas, CTAs and correct WhatsApp deep links (wa.me/919315371167). 'Explore All Courses' and 'View All Locations' homepage buttons navigate correctly. Homepage 'Full details' link goes to /courses/:id (verified for science). Back links return to /courses and /locations. Footer email = tutor@learnwithvijayshree.com. Appointment form submits successfully with Sonner success toast 'Appointment request submitted successfully! We\'ll contact you soon.'. Blog post page (/blog/5-ways-to-make-math-fun) renders with shared navbar+footer.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.js is ~350 lines and contains many concerns (Navbar duplication, course block, region card, appointment form, blog list). Consider splitting AppointmentForm into its own component for maintainability, similar to how CoursesPage/LocationsPage were extracted.

Toast is fired twice in a row (2 identical sonner toast elements captured during single submit). Not a blocker, but worth confirming that setState/toast() is not being invoked in a duplicate effect or a StrictMode double-render path in production build.

CoursesPage/LocationsPage RegionPreviewCard subcomponent pattern (used to avoid babel visual-edits plugin crash on nested .map with outer member expressions) is fine, but add a code comment near those subcomponents explaining WHY they exist so future refactors do not inline them and re-trigger the bundler crash.
seed_data_creation: None (form submit created 1 TEST appointment record in backend via existing POST /api/appointments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend routing for /courses, /courses/:id, /locations, /locations/:id, / and /blog/:slug all working end-to-end. All requested data-testids present: navbar, nav-link-*, nav-book-demo, courses-card-{math,science,english,hindi,phonics}, courses-cta-button, course-title, course-highlight-0, course-level-0..3, course-cta-button, course-bottom-cta, course-whatsapp-cta, course-back-link, locations-card-{usa,canada,europe,australia,dubai}, locations-cta-button, location-title, location-area-0, location-course-math, location-cta-button, location-whatsapp-cta, location-back-link, intro-video, explore-all-courses, view-all-locations, input-{name,email,phone,message}, submit-appointment-button, footer-email. WhatsApp URL asserted = https://wa.me/919315371167. Console error count = 0 across Home, Courses, Course Detail, Locations, Location Detail and Blog Post.
